_README: See tests/fixtures/README.md for curation rules. fixtureMissing:true means the failure mode is documented but the binary file hasn't been sourced yet (mostly PDF/EPUB/DOCX). The eval harness skips those with a warning.

clean-novel.txt.purpose: Happy-path baseline: CHAPTER 1/2/3 with proper blank-line separation

allcaps-false-positive.txt.purpose: Bait the ALL-CAPS heading false-positive in detectStructure.js:17-19
allcaps-false-positive.txt.expectedFailureMode: Current parser produces 2 sections; the all-caps sentence in the middle is misidentified as a chapter heading

roman-numerals.txt.purpose: Roman-numeral chapter detection (CHAPTER I, II, III, IV)

numbered-clauses.txt.purpose: Legal/technical doc with hierarchical numbered headings (1, 1.1, 1.2, 2, 2.1) — should NOT be parsed as chapters
numbered-clauses.txt.expectedFailureMode: Current parser may misidentify '1. Introduction', '1.1 Background' as chapter breaks

prologue-epilogue.txt.purpose: Prologue + chapter + epilogue (named front/back matter handling)

ornamental-titles.txt.purpose: Chapter titles that look like sentences ('The Day Everything Changed') — currently miss
ornamental-titles.txt.expectedFailureMode: Current parser produces 1 section because the headings don't match CHAPTER/PART regex

no-structure.txt.purpose: Plain prose with no headings at all — should produce a single 'document' section

acronyms-isolated.txt.purpose: Short isolated acronym (NASA) on its own line surrounded by blank lines — should NOT split the paragraph
acronyms-isolated.txt.expectedFailureMode: Current parser splits at the NASA line because it matches ALL-CAPS heuristic

hyphenated-newline.txt.purpose: Soft-hyphen line-break joining ('para-\ngraph') — text-format parsers don't currently rejoin
hyphenated-newline.txt.expectedFailureMode: Words split across newlines stay split; reader sees 'exam-' and 'ple' as separate tokens

page-numbered.txt.purpose: Page-of-N markers (Page 1 of 200) embedded in body text — should NOT be section breaks

html-as-txt.txt.purpose: HTML body saved with .txt extension — content sniffer (Phase 2) should upgrade dispatch to parseHTMLStructured

md-as-txt.txt.purpose: Markdown body saved with .txt extension — content sniffer (Phase 2) should upgrade dispatch to parseMarkdownStructured

binary-as-md.md.purpose: Correctly-typed .md — content sniffer (Phase 2) confirms 'md' but App.jsx skips the route-change log since sniff matches extension

escape-sequences.md.purpose: Bait the escape-character bug in preprocessMarkdown — \_underscore\_ and \*asterisk\* should NOT trigger emphasis
escape-sequences.md.expectedFailureMode: Current preprocessMarkdown rewrites escaped chars as emphasis markers; renderer shows them italicized/bolded

nested-code-fence.md.purpose: Code blocks containing backticks; preprocessMarkdown's greedy code-fence regex can corrupt
nested-code-fence.md.expectedFailureMode: Nested fence regex breaks; placeholder restoration on whitespace-only blocks is fragile

frontmatter-yaml.md.purpose: YAML front matter at top — should not appear as document body
frontmatter-yaml.md.expectedFailureMode: Current parser includes the --- block as body text

setext-headings.md.purpose: Setext-style headings (=== and --- underlines) — recognized by full MD parsers but not by the custom preprocessor
setext-headings.md.expectedFailureMode: Phase 3 (marked.lexer swap) will handle setext correctly; current preprocessor does not

links-images.md.purpose: Inline links, reference links, and images — labels should survive, URLs dropped

clean-article.html.purpose: Happy-path HTML article with h1 chapter breaks

h4-only.html.purpose: Document using h4 as chapter heading — silent flatten in current parser (detectStructure.js:160)
h4-only.html.expectedFailureMode: Phase 4 fix expands h[1-3] regex to h[1-6]; current parser produces 1 wall-of-text section

script-leak.html.purpose: Script and style tags in body — currently leak into rendered text via .textContent
script-leak.html.expectedFailureMode: JavaScript and CSS source code appears as paragraph text; Phase 4 strips these before walking

malformed.html.purpose: Malformed HTML — unclosed tags. text/html DOMParser auto-corrects; behavior should be predictable

inline-formatting.html.purpose: Inline em/strong/code/sub/sup/a — currently flattened to plain text
inline-formatting.html.expectedFailureMode: Inline semantics lost; H₂O renders as 'H2O', chemical formulas degrade

no-headings.html.purpose: Plain paragraphs with no headings — should produce a single section

deeply-nested.html.purpose: Chapter heading buried 4 divs deep — current parser walks body.children only

comments-preserved.html.purpose: HTML comments interspersed with content — should be ignored

pg-pride-and-prejudice.epub.purpose: Happy-path EPUB2 with NCX TOC (from PG library: pg1342)

pg-great-gatsby.epub.purpose: Happy-path EPUB with chapter titles in NCX (pg64317)

epub3-nav-xhtml.epub.purpose: EPUB3 with nav.xhtml instead of NCX — current parser misses titles
epub3-nav-xhtml.epub.expectedFailureMode: EPUB3 books get fallback 'Chapter 1/2/3' titles; real titles in nav.xhtml are ignored

epub-missing-idref.epub.purpose: Spine references an idref not present in manifest — silently skipped today
epub-missing-idref.epub.expectedFailureMode: Spine entries with missing idref silently dropped without error

epub-malformed-opf.epub.purpose: OPF XML has a parsererror — DOMParser returns parsererror node silently; current parser doesn't check
epub-malformed-opf.epub.expectedFailureMode: Phase 1 fix throws 'malformed OPF'; current parser returns empty sections

epub-all-image-chapter.epub.purpose: Chapter with only img tags, no text — silently disappears
epub-all-image-chapter.epub.expectedFailureMode: Image-only chapter silently skipped; chapter dropdown jumps from 2 to 4

epub-inline-semantics.epub.purpose: Chapters with em/strong/sub/sup — currently stripped to plain text
epub-inline-semantics.epub.expectedFailureMode: Chemical formulas (H₂O) render as plain text (H2O)

epub-bom-utf8.epub.purpose: EPUB with UTF-8 BOM in OPF/NCX/XHTML — encoding handling

epub-frontmatter-spine.epub.purpose: Frontmatter (title page, copyright, dedication) in spine — currently numbered as chapters 1/2/3

academic-multicolumn.pdf.purpose: Multi-column academic paper — text columns scramble word-by-word in current parser
academic-multicolumn.pdf.expectedFailureMode: Column-detection histogram fails on wide-margin papers; output is interleaved garbage

scanned-image-only.pdf.purpose: Scanned PDF with no extractable text — should report 'needs OCR'
scanned-image-only.pdf.expectedFailureMode: Current parser returns empty content with generic 'no readable text' error

encrypted-password.pdf.expectedFailureMode: pdf.js throws PasswordException with raw message; user sees generic error

with-outline.pdf.purpose: PDF with outline (bookmarks) — happy path for chapter detection

no-outline.pdf.purpose: PDF without outline — falls back to per-page sections

with-tables.pdf.purpose: PDF with embedded tables — currently flattened to text soup
with-tables.pdf.expectedFailureMode: Table structure lost; rows concatenate into unreadable jumble

with-footnotes.pdf.purpose: PDF with footnotes and running headers — currently leak into body
with-footnotes.pdf.expectedFailureMode: Page-number lines and running headers appear as body paragraphs

soft-hyphen-linebreak.pdf.expectedFailureMode: Hyphenation regex only matches ASCII hyphen; soft-hyphen stays split

large-1000-pages.pdf.purpose: Performance fixture: 1000-page PDF — current parser freezes main thread

headings-styled.docx.purpose: Word doc with Heading 1/2/3 styles applied — current parser produces flat output
headings-styled.docx.expectedFailureMode: Heading styles collapse to plain p; document hierarchy lost

list-heavy.docx.purpose: Bullet + numbered lists — flattened to paragraphs currently
list-heavy.docx.expectedFailureMode: Lists lose semantics; render as continuous prose

table-heavy.docx.purpose: Tables — converted to row-by-row text soup
table-heavy.docx.expectedFailureMode: Table cells concatenate in DOM order; unreadable output

track-changes.docx.purpose: Word doc with unaccepted track changes
track-changes.docx.expectedFailureMode: Deleted text and reviewer comments leak into body content

math-equations.docx.expectedFailureMode: Equations rendered as garbled XML text or stripped silently

doc-binary-mis-extension.doc.purpose: Old binary .doc renamed .docx — should fail with friendly error
doc-binary-mis-extension.doc.expectedFailureMode: Cryptic mammoth error; no 'convert to .docx first' message

headers-footers.docx.purpose: Page headers and footers — currently stripped silently

footnotes.docx.purpose: Footnotes — currently inline-rendered or stripped inconsistently

rtl-arabic.docx.purpose: Right-to-left text — bidi attributes stripped by mammoth

empty-paragraphs.docx.purpose: Intentional spacing (scene breaks in fiction) via empty paragraphs
empty-paragraphs.docx.expectedFailureMode: Empty paragraphs collapsed; visual rhythm lost
